channel.title: Kung_fu_yoga on ijadux2's website
channel.description: Recent content in Kung_fu_yoga on ijadux2's website

item.title: Indian_culture
item.description:
Indian_culture

Today 2026-03-06 16:45 i was watching this movie which was released in 2017 in India. called Kung fu yoga the director of this movie is Chinese respected Stanley Tong and famous Jackie Chan. Jackie Chan was the main leading character of the story, and there were many Indian actors and actoress as well,

main story

the story focus on the largest and the oldest Empire Magadh presently India, “Bihar”, and our Indian culture amoug with Chinese technology.
